name: Artistic Sense
descs:
Deal +35% damage against enemies suffering negative effects (Low Morale, Panic) from SP loss.

If the Skill inflicts [Sinking] Potency or Count(including Unique 'Sinking'), deal +10% damage in addition to the above.

When [Sinking]'s effect applies to enemies without Sanity, the Affinity of the damage inflicted changes to whatever is the most effective.

Deal +40% damage against enemies with less than 0 SP.

If the Skill inflicts [Sinking] Potency or Count(including Unique 'Sinking'), deal +10% damage in addition to the above.

When [Sinking]'s effect applies to enemies without Sanity, the Affinity of the damage inflicted changes to whatever is the most effective.

Deal +50% damage against enemies without SP or with less than 0 SP.

If the Skill inflicts [Sinking] Potency or Count(including Unique 'Sinking'), deal +10% damage in addition to the above.

When [Sinking]'s effect applies to enemies without Sanity, the Affinity of the damage inflicted changes to whatever is the most effective.
